tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
          Uh, uh, uh[/tab]
              
       
[Chorus]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
I was thinking 'bout her, thinking 'bout me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Thinking 'bout us, what we gon' be?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]  
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I was at the top and now it's like I'm in the basement[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Number one spot, now she found her a replacement[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            
  I swear now I can't take it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Knowing somebody's got my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
  And now you ain't around, baby I can't think[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]F[/ch]
I shoulda put it down, shoulda got that ring[/tab]
                             
'Cause I can still feel it in the air
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      
See her pretty face, run my fingers through her hair[/tab]
  
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
My love of my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
My shorty, my wife[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
She left me, I'm tight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause I knew that it just ain't right[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
I was thinking 'bout her, thinking 'bout me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Thinking 'bout us, what we gon' be?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]  
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
When I be riding man I swear I see her face at every turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Trying to get my Usher on but I can't let it burn[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                                                    [ch]C[/ch]
And I just hope she know that she the only one I yearn - for[/tab]

My woman, oh I miss her, when will I learn?
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                           
Didn't give her all my love, I guess now I got my payback[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Now I'm in the club thinking all about my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             
  Hey, she was so easy to love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  But wait, I guess that love wasn't enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
  I'm going through it every time that I'm alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
  And now I'm missing, wishing she pick up the phone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But she made a decision that she wanted to move on[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  'Cause I was wrong[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
I was thinking 'bout her, thinking 'bout me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Thinking 'bout us, what we gon' be?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]  
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                                         
And now they're gone[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
And you wishing you could give them everything[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Said if you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                                         
And now they're gone[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
